description_long: This restaurant complex features three distinct buildings arranged around a central outdoor dining area. The main building has a dark brown facade with a red-tiled gabled roof and is adorned with lush green vines cascading down its walls. Surrounding it are two yellow-painted buildings with gray shingled roofs, balconies, and decorative window shutters, one of which displays a colorful mural. The outdoor seating area is furnished with multiple tables shaded by large orange and beige umbrellas, and is bordered by potted palm trees and a curved stone walkway. Street lamps, a bicycle, and a menu board add to the urban ambiance, while the riverside setting and festive string lights enhance the inviting atmosphere. The overall scene suggests a lively, Mediterranean-inspired restaurant hub with both indoor and outdoor dining options.
description: A Mediterranean-style restaurant complex with three buildings, outdoor seating under umbrellas, lush greenery, and urban decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main brown building with vines, outdoor tables with umbrellas, palm trees, and two yellow buildings in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the yellow building with a balcony, the brown building's side wall with vines, and the arrangement of outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the two yellow buildings, one with a mural, and the central courtyard area between the structures.
description_view_3: Back view showing the gray-shingled roofs, the riverside walkway, and the rear facades of the buildings with visible balconies and greenery.
attribute_signage: A menu board is visible near the outdoor seating area; a colorful mural is painted on the side of one yellow building.
attribute_facade_design: The restaurant's facade features a mix of yellow-painted and dark brown walls, with red-tiled and gray-shingled roofs. Decorative elements include cascading green vines, balconies with railings, and window shutters. The overall style is warm and inviting, with Mediterranean influences and urban touches such as street lamps and a mural.
